message:
fix(web): enable iOS scrolling in flywheel tool sheet

Same fix as jargon.tsx - the tool detail bottom sheet had the same
iOS scrolling bug:

- Added `flex flex-col max-h-[70vh]` to card container
- Added `shrink-0` to handle div
- Changed scrollable div to `min-h-0 flex-1 overflow-y-auto overscroll-contain`
- Added `WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch'` for iOS momentum scrolling

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
